cb_teams_marketplace.description: CodeBuddy Teams Marketplace - 团队协作与文档处理插件集合

manifest.name: cb_teams_marketplace
manifest.description: CodeBuddy Teams Marketplace - 团队协作与文档处理插件集合

plugins.name: internal-comms
plugins.description: A set of resources to help write internal communications using company-preferred formats (status reports, 3P updates, newsletters, FAQs, incident reports, etc.)

plugins.name: executing-marketing-campaigns
plugins.description: Plans, creates, and optimizes marketing campaigns including content strategy, social media, email, and analytics

plugins.name: document-skills
plugins.description: Collection of document processing suite including Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and PDF capabilities

plugins.name: general-skills
plugins.description: A collection of general-purpose skills including document conversion (markitdown), skill discovery, UI/UX design, and frontend development capabilities

plugins.name: data-analysis
plugins.description: Data analysis plugin with Excel spreadsheet creation, editing, and analysis capabilities. Supports formulas, formatting, data analysis, and visualization. Also includes WeChat article search via Sogou for high-quality Chinese content retrieval.

plugins.name: modern-webapp
plugins.description: Modern web application development plugin with React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, and comprehensive UI/UX design system. Includes tools for project initialization, design intelligence, icon management, and browser testing.

plugins.name: ppt-implement
plugins.description: 智能 PPT 生成助手，一键将您的想法转化为精美演示文稿

plugins.name: deep-research
plugins.description: 深度研究插件，支持全面的网络调研、信息综合和知识发现。包含微信公众号文章检索等高质量信息源搜索能力。
plugins.description_en: Deep research plugin that enables comprehensive web research, information synthesis, and knowledge discovery. Includes WeChat article search for high-quality Chinese content.

plugins.name: data
plugins.description: 数据分析插件，支持 SQL 查询、数据探索、可视化、仪表板构建和洞察生成。包含完整的数据分析工作流程和最佳实践。
plugins.description_en: Data analysis plugin with SQL queries, data exploration, visualization, dashboard building, and insight generation. Includes complete data analysis workflows and best practices.

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: 财务与会计插件，支持月末结账、日记账分录、账户核对、财务报表生成、差异分析、SOX 审计支持和合规测试。
plugins.description_en: Finance and accounting plugin with month-end close, journal entries, account reconciliation, financial statements, variance analysis, SOX audit support, and compliance testing.

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.description: 产品管理插件，支持功能规格编写、路线图规划、利益相关者沟通、用户研究综合、竞品分析、指标审查、产品头脑风暴和冲刺规划。
plugins.description_en: Product management plugin with feature specs, roadmap planning, stakeholder communications, user research synthesis, competitive analysis, metrics review, product brainstorming, and sprint planning.

plugins.name: design-to-code
plugins.description: 设计工具套件：Figma 设计转代码、无障碍审查、设计评审、设计交付、设计系统管理、用户研究、UX 文案。支持 React、Svelte、Vue。
plugins.description_en: Design toolkit: Figma-to-code, accessibility review, design critique, design handoff, design system management, user research, and UX copy. Supports React, Svelte, and Vue.

plugins.name: codebuddy-chat-web
plugins.description: Initialize a web-based chat application powered by CodeBuddy Agent SDK with React frontend and Express backend

plugins.name: webapp-testing
plugins.description: Web 应用测试助手，引导用户启动、配置和测试 Web 应用

plugins.name: dockerfile-gen
plugins.description: Dockerfile Generator - Automated Dockerfile generation with best practices for containerization

plugins.name: remotion-video-generator
plugins.description: 使用 Remotion 自动生成视频。支持检测视频创建请求、创建分镜脚本、处理环境配置，输出 MP4 文件。涵盖讲解视频、产品演示、社交媒体内容和演示文稿。
plugins.description_en: Automatically generates videos using Remotion. Detects video creation requests, creates storyboards, handles environment setup, and outputs MP4 files. Supports explainer videos, product demos, social media content, and presentations.

plugins.name: agent-sdk-dev
plugins.description: 用于创建和验证 CodeBuddy Agent SDK 应用程序的综合插件，支持 Python 和 TypeScript。包含 /new-sdk-app 命令用于项目脚手架，以及验证代理用于检查最佳实践。
plugins.description_en: A comprehensive plugin for creating and verifying CodeBuddy Agent SDK applications in Python and TypeScript. Includes /new-sdk-app command for scaffolding projects and verifier agents for checking best practices.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: 提供创建高效 Claude 技能的指南,通过专业知识、工作流程和工具集成来扩展 AI 助手的能力

plugins.name: financial-analysis
plugins.description: 金融分析核心工具，支持 DCF 估值、可比公司分析、LBO 模型、三张表模型、竞争格局分析和 PPT 质检。
plugins.description_en: Core financial modeling and analysis tools: DCF valuation, comparable company analysis, LBO models, 3-statement models, competitive analysis, and deck QC.

plugins.name: investment-banking
plugins.description: 投资银行生产力工具，支持 CIM 撰写、并购模型、买方名单、交易追踪、流程函和 Pitch Deck 制作。
plugins.description_en: Investment banking productivity tools: CIM creation, merger models, buyer lists, deal tracking, process letters, and pitch deck creation.

plugins.name: equity-research
plugins.description: 股票研究工具，支持财报分析、首次覆盖报告、盘前预览、晨会纪要、选股筛选和投资论点追踪。
plugins.description_en: Equity research tools: earnings analysis, initiating coverage reports, earnings previews, morning notes, stock screening, and investment thesis tracking.

plugins.name: private-equity
plugins.description: 私募股权工具，支持 Deal Sourcing、项目筛选、尽调清单、IC Memo、单位经济学分析和投后管理。
plugins.description_en: Private equity deal sourcing and workflow tools: company discovery, deal screening, due diligence, IC memos, unit economics, and portfolio monitoring.

plugins.name: wealth-management
plugins.description: 财富管理与理财顾问工具，支持客户回顾、财务规划、投资组合再平衡、税损收割和投资提案。
plugins.description_en: Wealth management and financial advisory tools: client reviews, financial planning, portfolio rebalancing, tax-loss harvesting, and investment proposals.

plugins.name: lseg
plugins.description: LSEG 金融数据与分析工具，支持债券分析、外汇套利、宏观利率监控、期权波动率分析和掉期曲线策略。
plugins.description_en: LSEG financial data and analytics: bond pricing, yield curve analysis, FX carry trades, options valuation, and macro dashboards.

plugins.name: spglobal
plugins.description: S&P Global 金融数据与分析技能，包括公司 Tearsheet、财报预览和交易摘要。
plugins.description_en: S&P Global financial data and analytics skills including company tearsheets, earnings previews, and transaction summaries.

plugins.name: trading-agent
plugins.description: 多角色辩论式交易智能体，对股票/基金/指数进行系统性投资分析，输出 BUY/SELL/HOLD 建议。涵盖市场技术分析、基本面分析、新闻情绪分析、多空辩论、交易决策和三方风险评估全流程，数据源使用 NeoData 实时金融数据。
plugins.description_en: Multi-role debate trading agent for systematic investment analysis of stocks, funds, and indices. Full pipeline: market analysis, fundamentals, news sentiment, bull/bear debate, trading decision, 3-way risk assessment. Powered by NeoData real-time financial data.

plugins.name: ai-hedge-fund
plugins.description: AI 对冲基金投资分析系统：19位投资大师并行分析 + 风险管理 + 投资组合决策的全流程投资分析。涵盖巴菲特、芒格、林奇、伯里、塔勒布、伍德、格雷厄姆等13位传奇投资哲学家 + 6位专业分析师，通过信号聚合投票输出 BUY/SELL/HOLD 建议。数据源使用 NeoData 金融数据服务。
plugins.description_en: AI Hedge Fund with 19 investment gurus analyzing in parallel — 13 legendary investors (Buffett, Munger, Lynch, Burry, Taleb, Wood, Graham, etc.) + 6 professional analysts. Signal aggregation voting for BUY/SELL/HOLD decisions. Powered by NeoData real-time financial data.

plugins.name: a-share-analysis
plugins.description: A股投资分析技能集，覆盖宏观研究、市场结构、个股深度、行业比较、资金行为、风险管理等 20 个专业分析 skill 和 7 个编排 agent（含总入口 a-share-advisor）。支持晨间策略简报、个股深度研报、板块选股、持仓诊断、主题投资猎手、资金行为全景等场景。
plugins.description_en: A-share investment analysis plugin with 20 professional skills and 7 orchestration agents (incl. unified a-share-advisor entry point) covering macro research, market structure, stock deep-dive, sector comparison, capital flow tracking, and risk management.

plugins.name: ardot-design-generator
plugins.description: Ardot设计工具：在Ardot中生成高质量设计稿，移动端UI，网站页面，web应用，幻灯片等设计稿
plugins.description_en: Ardot design tool: generate high-quality design drafts in Ardot, mobile UI, website pages, web applications, slides, etc.

plugins.name: sheetagent
plugins.description: 由腾讯文档团队出品的电子表格智能助手，支持通过自然语言创建、查询与编辑 xlsx 表格
plugins.description_en: An intelligent spreadsheet assistant by Tencent Docs team that supports creating, querying, and editing xlsx files via natural language.

plugins.description: 腾讯玄武实验室安全插件

plugins.description: 帮助用户发现和安装 AI Agent 技能，支持从 Vercel Skills 和 ClawHub 两个技能仓库搜索和安装

plugins.name: godot-mcp
plugins.description: Godot 4 MCP 集成插件，通过 AI 对话直接操作 Godot Editor。支持场景管理、节点操作、脚本编辑、项目运行等功能。
plugins.description_en: Godot 4 game development MCP integration. Enables AI to directly control the Godot Editor via MCP protocol for node creation, scene management, script editing, and full-stack game development assistance.

plugins.name: magicai-hub
plugins.description: Godot 4.x 游戏开发 AI 技能工具包。提供 GDScript 代码生成、数据驱动配置、场景/资源文件格式解析、资产路径修复、无头验证、工具函数库等专业能力，帮助 AI 更高效地协助 Godot 项目开发。
